title: elaphoglossum commissurale
intro: Elaphoglossum commissurale is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, commonly known as the elaphoglossum fern. It is native to Mexico and Central America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, due to its ability to stimulate the immune system. Elaphoglossum commissurale is typically prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the leaves in hot water, although further research is needed to confirm its full range of medicinal applications.
